content: controller-runtime reconcilers must be idempotent (re-running with same spec produces same outcome); use CreateOrUpdate not raw Create; only write status when it actually changed (status writes every reconcile bombard the API and can spin infinite requeues since Generation bump triggers rewatch); model status as a subresource with observedGeneration so staleness is detectable; return the error from Reconcile rather than Requeue:true so backoff behaves.
